narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2024-54529. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1203, T1199, T1566, T1595, T1190. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-12 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1203, T1199, T1566, T1595, T1190. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 13 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1203, T1566.002, T1199, T1566, T1190. Average risk score: 9.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 6 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-66376. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1203, T1195.003, T1566.002, T1204.001, T1199. Average risk score: 9.4/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-IR-02 has been observed in 6 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1203, T1485, T1199, T1204, T1566. Average risk score: 8.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 38 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3888. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1199, T1189, T1190, T1567, T1059. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 8.5/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 7 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1203, T1486, T1199, T1204.001, T1566. Average risk score: 8.1/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.
Threat actor CDB-FIN-07 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1203, T1111, T1566, T1190, T1555. Average risk score: 7.2/10.
Threat actor CDB-CN-01 has been observed in 3 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1203, T1071, T1595, T1190, T1059. Average risk score: 6.7/10.

Threat actor UNC-UNKNOWN has been observed in 194 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-33253, CVE-2026-4836, CVE-2026-33559, CVE-2026-33809, CVE-2026-2343. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1583.001, T1071.004, T1199, T1087, T1190. CRITICAL: 29 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 5.8/10.

findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE - quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto - quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
